The model '''TD1.4 [[Electrobinoculars/Legends|electrobinoculars]]''' were manufactured by the [[Neuro-Saav Corporation]] and used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. They were used by members of [[Desert Sands]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].

{{Tech-stub}}
